name: mobile
comment:scripts: Build scripts target Windows (npm runs them via cmd) and pin JDK 17 — the system JAVA_HOME is broken on this machine. installDebug/apk:* assume android/ exists (run `prebuild` first when native modules change).

scripts.apk:debug: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.10.7-hotspot" && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-17.0.10.7-hotspot" && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
